app.name: BLP Converter
app.tagline: Fast BLP ↔ PNG conversion for World of Warcraft textures
app.description: A lightweight desktop tool for converting Blizzard BLP texture files to PNG and back. Drop files on either side of the window — BLP on the left, PNG on the right — and conversions run in parallel. Outputs land next to your source files unless you pick a custom folder in Settings.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: Drop BLP or PNG files — outputs save next to originals by default.

settings.title: Settings
settings.outputFolderHint: Optional. Leave unset to save converted files next to the originals.

blpview.title: Explorer Thumbnails (BLPView)
blpview.unsupportedReason: BLPView is a Windows File Explorer shell extension. Folder thumbnails for .blp files are only available on Windows 10/11.

conversion.noFiles: No {{format}} files found for this side.
conversion.busy: Already converting — wait for the current batch to finish.
